payload.title: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Meeting
payload.description: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Meeting book for January 2021 containing: Committee Work Plan, Report on Operations November 2020, Safety Report November 2020, Financial Reports November and December 2020, and Capital Program Project Status Report December 2020.

payload.description: Subject of the Bridges and Tunnels Committee Meeting book. Owns and operates bridges and tunnels including Bronx-Whitestone Bridge, Cross Bay Bridge, Henry Hudson Bridge, Hugh L. Carey Tunnel, Marine Parkway Bridge, Queens Midtown Tunnel, Robert F. Kennedy Bridge, Throgs Neck Bridge, and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge.

tool_args.label: B&T November 2020 Paid Vehicle Traffic
tool_args.raw_text: In November, B&T paid vehicle traffic was 21.9 million vehicles, which was 18.7% lower than in the same period in 2019.

tool_args.label: November 2020 E-ZPass Market Share
tool_args.raw_text: November E-ZPass market share was 94.0%, slightly higher than in October but 1.4 percentage points below the same period in 2019.

tool_args.label: November 2020 E-ZPass Transactions Decline
tool_args.raw_text: Average daily E-ZPass transactions decreased by 20.1% on a year-to-year basis for the month, and Tolls by Mail transactions increased by 12.6%.

tool_args.label: November 2020 Tolls by Mail Transactions Increase
tool_args.raw_text: Tolls by Mail transactions increased by 12.6%.

tool_args.label: November 2020 Total Transactions by Payment Method
tool_args.raw_text: E-ZPass 20,570,841; Tolls by Mail 1,319,156; Total 21,889,997

tool_args.label: November 2020 Passenger Car Average Daily Traffic Decline
tool_args.raw_text: Average daily traffic decreased by 19.1% for passenger cars compared to November 2019.

payload.scope: Passenger cars at all B&T facilities

tool_args.label: November 2020 Other Vehicle Average Daily Traffic Decline
tool_args.raw_text: Average daily traffic decreased by 12.8% for other vehicles compared to November 2019.

payload.scope: Other (non-passenger) vehicles at all B&T facilities

tool_args.label: November 2020 Vehicle Toll Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Vehicle Toll Revenue: Mid-Year Forecast $88.368M, Actual $139.061M, favorable variance $50.692M (57.4%)

tool_args.label: Year-to-Date November 2020 Vehicle Toll Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Vehicle Toll Revenue YTD: Mid-Year Forecast $1,235.365M, Actual $1,487.826M, favorable variance $252.462M (20.4%)

tool_args.label: November 2020 Net Surplus Nonreimbursable
tool_args.raw_text: Net Surplus/(Deficit) November 2020: Actual $109.085M vs Mid-Year Forecast $46.987M

tool_args.label: Customer Collision Rate 12-Month Average Dec 2019-Nov 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Collisions Rate per Million Vehicles: Dec 2018-Nov 2019: 6.30, Dec 2019-Nov 2020: 4.34

tool_args.label: Customer Injury Collision Rate 12-Month Average
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Injury Collisions Rate per Million Vehicles: Dec 2018-Nov 2019: 0.90, Dec 2019-Nov 2020: 0.72

tool_args.label: 2020 Total Capital Commitments
tool_args.raw_text: In 2020, Bridges and Tunnels made 131 commitments at a value of $183.2 million (70.8% of plan) against the 2020 Plan which called for 127 commitments with a total value of $258.7 million.

tool_args.label: 2020 Total Capital Completions Value
tool_args.raw_text: 33 completions totaling $660.3 million, against the 2020 plan calling for 19 completions with a total value of $406.1 million (162.6% of plan).

tool_args.label: 2020 CBDTP Commitments
tool_args.raw_text: 2020 CBDTP Commitments: $45.2 million

tool_args.label: 2020 Moving NY Forward Initiative Commitments
tool_args.raw_text: 26 commitments totaling $76.1 million are related to the Moving NY Forward initiative

payload.scope: Moving NY Forward initiative at B&T

tool_args.label: Commitments Below Plan Due to MTA Procurement Pause from COVID-19
tool_args.raw_text: Commitments were $75.6 million below the 2020 Plan, which is mainly due to the MTA Procurement Pause resulting from the impacts of the COVID-19 Pandemic.

payload.claim_text: Commitments were $75.6 million below the 2020 Plan, which is mainly due to the MTA Procurement Pause resulting from the impacts of the COVID-19 Pandemic.
payload.description: Capital commitments at B&T were $75.6 million below plan primarily due to the COVID-19 pandemic causing a procurement pause.
